localizations.title: Christmas in July
localizations.hiddenObject_1: This electrical wire has a strange shape.
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Nothing was left to chance in the arrangement of the gifts, especially the green packages.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: The bars of the door cover part of HELP ME, don't you see a number in the remaining part ?
localizations.code_7431: You open Santa's padlock... He's free now, well done! He'll be able to rest on the Brittany coast before starting his next tour. Merry Christmas to all!
localizations.hint_2: This horrible creature should be able to hunt pests ruthlessly.
localizations.hint_14: Look closely at the shape of this plug to understand where to plug it in.
localizations.hint_23: The metal hook of this ornament is thin but strong.
localizations.hint_34: Someone took the time to draw these three characters in a specific order.
localizations.hint_35: This list is written on the back of a book page. Try to get its number.
localizations.hint_42_first: The music from the 78 rpm record should help you find this code. Listen carefully to the lyrics.
localizations.hint_42: « Et tu souris jaune vert l'abeille. »
localizations.hint_50: Turn the plug you have to make it fit into the correct socket.
localizations.hint_51_first: This phone has several uses. Look closely at the animals on the keys and their initials.
localizations.hint_51: What if you started by typing NOEL (7836) ?
localizations.hint_52: It would take the strength of two animals to break through this barricade.
localizations.hint_63: This cutie must absolutely be protected from the vile creature that was playing with the wire.
localizations.hint_65: Look at the tracks made by the two animals… They could break something.
localizations.hint_67: Complete the crossword puzzle correctly. You should see a number appear : take the corresponding card.
localizations.hint_69: Try to force this door with a hooked object.
localizations.hint_78_first: The lyrics give you the final code. What words do you hear ?
localizations.hint_78: « Et tu souris jaune vert l'abeille. »
localizations.hint_84: Look at the first letter of each animal's name. Relate them to the phone keypad.
localizations.hint_92_first: Turn the ball using the buttons. Santa's friends will give you the correct sequence.
localizations.hint_92: The correct sequence will be given to you by Santa's friends. Listen carefully to what they have to say.
localizations.hint_93: Look closely at the green gifts in the center… and take the corresponding card.
localizations.hint_97_first: Follow the electrical wire to set each pair of bulbs to the correct color.
localizations.hint_97: Look at the stars on the cat's hat to find the correct sequence.
localizations.hint_99: Some names on this list will need to be called. But you still need to reach Santa first.
localizations.answer_hint_92: 2 to the left / 1 down / 3 to the right.
localizations.answer_hint_97: Red / Blue / Green / Yellow / Red / Blue / Green / Yellow following the wire.
localizations.machine_92: You open the door ! What's hiding behind it ?
